docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIF CORPORATION
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIF CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BUECHLER, GINNY A. AKA VIRGINIA BUECHLER
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $811.27 INTEREST, $14.50 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIF CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIF CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUECHLER, GINNY A. AKA VIRGINIA BUECHLER $829.57 PRINCIPAL, $811.27 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,654.84, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE 	03414 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
